title: First time since 1972, humans leave Earth orbit: Artemis II astronauts head for the Moon; what comes next?
summary_full: Humans have once again ventured beyond Earth's orbit as NASA's Artemis II mission successfully propelled its crew towards the Moon. This historic flight, the first since 1972, carries a diverse crew on a lunar flyby, marking a significant step in humanity's return to deep space exploration and paving the way for future lunar missions.
